Paste one URL per line or a JSON array of URLs. E.g.:

settings.title: Settings
settings.restoreConfirmMsg: Are you sure? This will remove all manually added repositories and restore the defaults.
settings.aboutApp: SpeedySign is a visual manager to easily explore, sign, and install iOS apps.
settings.importReposSub: Load repos from a JSON file
settings.importInvalid: Invalid backup file or no repositories.
settings.importErrorTooLarge: File is too large. The limit is 1 MB.
settings.supportDesc: Help me keep the servers active and fast. Any support on Ko-fi is super welcome! ☕
settings.supportDescShort: Help me keep the signing servers active.
settings.supportButton: Buy me a coffee on Ko-fi
settings.telegramDesc: Join our official channel to download repository files (.json), stay updated on news, and share with other users.
settings.redditDescShort: Visit our official community r/SpeedySign on Reddit.
settings.termsDesc1: SpeedySign is an independent, educational developer utility designed as a blank-canvas environment for client-side cryptographic signing and management of iOS application packages (.ipa files).
settings.termsDesc2: 1. Content and Source Liability: The software does not provide, host, or reference any copyrighted applications or pre-configured third-party sources. The end-user assumes full and sole responsibility for verifying the copyright status and legal compliance of any custom repositories and signing certificates imported.
settings.termsDesc3: 2. Security and Import Thresholds: To ensure software stability and performance, specific import limits are enforced exclusively for configuring and importing repository lists (a 1 MB file size limit for configuration backups, a 200,000 character input threshold, and up to 100 URLs per batch import). The uploading and signing of the user's custom application packages (.ipa files) are not subject to this 1 MB limit.
settings.termsDesc4: 3. Privacy and Data Retention: Any binary files temporarily transmitted to the signing node for processing are processed under strict privacy protocols and permanently purged within 5 minutes. No logs, metadata, or persistent copies are stored on our servers.
settings.termsDesc5: Acknowledgment: By utilizing this utility, you certify that you hold the necessary legal rights to use, modify, and sign the target binaries, and you agree to fully indemnify and hold harmless the developers of SpeedySign from any claims, liabilities, damages, or certificate revocations arising from your usage.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.emptySub: Import a .p12 and .mobileprovision to sign apps.
certificates.errorMissingFiles: You must select both files (.p12 and .mobileprovision).

appDetail.errorNoDownload: This app does not have a download URL available.

appDetail.errorCertActive: Could not get the active certificate.

library.title: My Apps
library.deleteMsg: Delete this installation record? The app on your device will not be uninstalled.
library.emptyDesc: Apps you sign and install with SpeedySign will appear here with the time remaining before revocation.
library.noUrlForResign: This app does not have a saved IPA URL for re-signing.
library.noCertActive: No active certificate. Import one in Settings → Certificates.
library.installConfirm: The app has been signed successfully. Do you want to start the installation?
library.noAppsWithUrl: No apps have a saved URL for re-signing.
